response.justification: While the candidate has strong full-stack and diverse programming experience, there is no evidence of professional C++ development on Windows or direct experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains — both mandatory requirements for this role. His C++ exposure is limited to academic/bachelor’s thesis work and NI LabWindows, which is not equivalent to enterprise financial systems development.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong DevOps and CI/CD practices demonstrated through multiple roles
Proven ability to deliver complex systems and open-source tools
concerns: No professional C++ experience on Windows platform as required
Lacks demonstrated domain expertise in fixed income or capital markets
SQL experience is listed but not contextualized in financial systems or high-volume trading environments
